entity_candidates.definition: The Portland Golf Club is a private golf club located in the unincorporated Raleigh Hills area of eastern Washington County, Oregon, southwest of downtown Portland. Founded in 1914 by nine businessmen, it hosted the 1946 PGA Championship, won by Ben Hogan, and its clubhouse and course were listed on the National Register of Historic Places in 2023.
